title: Senior Data Engineer
description: We're seeking a Senior Data Engineer with 5+ years building production ETL pipelines in Python. You'll own data infrastructure: design and operate Airflow DAGs, optimize SQL on PostgreSQL/Snowflake, build streaming consumers in PySpark, and partner with analysts on data modeling. Required: 5+ years Python, advanced SQL, Airflow, dbt, AWS (S3, Glue, Lambda). Comp: $145k-$175k base. Remote US.
notes: Strong overlap with the canonical profile across skills + experience + seniority + comp.

title: Staff Data Engineer - Platform
description: Staff Data Engineer to lead our internal data platform. Design and ship the central data warehouse, mentor 2-3 engineers, drive architectural decisions for batch and streaming pipelines. Required: 7+ years data engineering, deep Python + SQL, hands-on Spark or Flink, AWS or GCP, dbt for analytics modeling. Comp: $200k-$240k base + equity. Hybrid (3 days/week SF).
notes: Even stronger seniority match; comp + skills both high.

title: Data Engineer
description: Data Engineer at Series B startup. Own ETL from scratch: ingest CRM + product events into Snowflake, model with dbt, expose via Looker. Python is required; bonus for Airflow or Dagster. Comp: $140k-$170k. Remote.
notes: Mid-senior fit; lower top-end on seniority dimension than -01/-02.

title: Senior Analytics Engineer
description: Senior Analytics Engineer to bridge data engineering and analytics. dbt-first stack on Snowflake, Python for non-trivial transforms, partner with analysts on metric definitions. Required: 4+ years SQL, dbt in production, Python for tooling. Comp: $155k-$180k. Remote.
notes: Analytics engineer is adjacent to data engineer — skills overlap heavily but title differs.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Senior Data Scientist on the ML team. Train + ship recommendation models, run A/B experiments, partner with ML engineers on production. Required: 5+ years applied DS, Python + SQL, deep statistics, sklearn/PyTorch in production. Comp: $170k-$200k. Hybrid.
notes: DS != DE — Python/SQL overlap but the core ML modeling skills are NOT in the profile.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Senior backend engineer building our public REST API. Python (FastAPI) on PostgreSQL. Required: 5+ years backend dev, API design, PostgreSQL, async Python. Comp: $160k-$190k. Remote.
notes: Python+SQL overlap real but role is API dev not data engineering — moderate fit.

title: Data Analyst
description: Data Analyst on the BI team. SQL-heavy work building dashboards in Looker, partner with finance + product. Required: 3+ years SQL, Looker or Tableau, Python a plus. Comp: $95k-$115k.
notes: SQL overlap but seniority + comp + role are lower than the profile; experience is too junior.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: ML Engineer on the platform team. Ship inference services in Python, build model deployment infra, partner with research scientists. Required: 4+ years ML or backend, Python, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes. Comp: $180k-$220k.
notes: Adjacent platform/infra role but ML core is not in the profile.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: Senior Frontend Engineer leading our React migration. Required: 5+ years React, TypeScript, modern CSS, accessibility. Comp: $160k-$190k.
notes: Completely off-target — frontend skills nowhere in the profile.

title: Embedded Firmware Engineer
description: Embedded firmware engineer for our IoT device line. Required: 5+ years C/C++, RTOS (FreeRTOS or similar), ARM Cortex-M, hardware bring-up. Comp: $140k-$180k.
notes: Different tech stack entirely; no overlap.

title: Director of Product Marketing
description: Director of Product Marketing for our B2B SaaS line. Required: 10+ years marketing leadership, GTM strategy, narrative development, executive presence. Comp: $200k-$250k + equity.
notes: Not even an engineering role — should score low across the board.

title: Junior QA Engineer
description: Junior QA Engineer to write Selenium tests against our web app. Required: 1-2 years QA or scripting (Python preferred), Selenium experience. Comp: $65k-$80k.
notes: Python adjacency is the only signal; seniority + comp + skill mismatch.
